The [[Type 2 Navigation Buoy]] was a [[hyperspace navigation buoy]]. Its [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] projection generated by a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] flight [[Computer/Legends|computer]] served as a visual reference marker for the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. The Type 2 was commonly used to mark hazards in [[Realspace/Legends|space]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
